California
Fair Political
Practices Commission

March 22, 1988

Kirk Alan Pessner
Paralegal/Administrator
Political Reports Unit
Nielsen, Merksamer, Hodgson & Parrinello
650 California Street, Suite 2650
San Francisco, CA 94108

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. I-88-103

Dear Kirk:

This is in reply to your letter dated March 2, 1988,
confirming our telephone conversation concerning sponsored
committees. (2 Cal. Code of Regs. Section 18419.)

Your letter accurately reflects our telephone conversation
and the advice I provided you and, as you requested, I have signed
and dated your letter. It is enclosed.

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of March 21, 1988, my
confirmation of the advice reiterated in your letter does not
constitute formal advice. The Commission can issue formal advice
only to a person whose duties under the Political Reform Act are in
question or to that person's authorized representative. (Section
18329(b), copy enclosed.) When an authorized representative asks for
advice on behalf of a person whose duties are in question, the name
and address of the person must be provided, as well as a specific
statement that authorization has been made.

You have not provided the name of the person on whose behalf
you are seeking advice. Therefore, my confirmation of the advice
reiterated in your letter constitutes informal assistance pursuant to
Regulation 18329(c).1/

_______________________

1/ Informal assistance does not provide the requestor with
the immunity provided by an opinion or formal written advice.
(Government Code Section 83114; 2 Cal. Code of Regs. Section
18329(c)(3).)

428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804-0807 • (916) 322-5660

Kirk Alan Pessner
March 22, 1988
Page Two


     If you have any questions, please contact me at (916)
322-5662.

                                        Sincerely,

                                        Diane M. Griffiths
                                        General Counsel
                                        [signature]
                                        By Jeanne Pritchard
                                           Division Chief
                                           Technical Assistance and
                                           Analysis Division

EPP

LAW OFFICES OF
NIELSEN, MERKSAMER, HODGSON, PARRINELLO & MUELLER
A PARTNERSHIP INCLUDING PROFESSIONAL CORPORATIONS

650 CALIFORNIA STREET, SUITE 2650
770 L STREET SUITE 800
SACRAMENTO, CALIFORNIA 95814
TELEPHONE (916) 446-6752

SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94108
TELEPHONE (415) 989-6800

FILE NUMBER

6290.02

March 2, 1988


Ms. Jeanne Pritchard
Fair Political Practices Commission
Post Office Box 807
Sacramento, California  95814

Re:  Regulation 18419—Sponsored Committees

Dear Jeanne:

     This letter will memorialize our telephone conversation
of February 25, 1988 regarding regulation 18419.  In that con-
versation, I described a situation in which a business entity
intends to contribute all or nearly all of the contributions to a
recipient committee established pursuant to Government Code
Section 82013(a) to support a ballot measure on the Kern County
June 7, 1988 ballot.

     I confirmed that this business entity, in addition to
making all or nearly all of the contributions to this ballot
measure committee, has identified itself as the sponsor in the
name of the ballot measure committee (pursuant to Government Code
84106) and intends to have a responsible officer of the sponsor
sign the campaign statement in addition to the signature of the
campaign committee treasurer.  This business entity has made no
other campaign contributions nor does it intend to make campaign
contributions other than those to this ballot committee.

     You advised us that it appears as though the business
entity is the sponsor of the committee and is itself not required
to file as a committee under Government Code Section 82013(c)
since it satisfies all the criteria of Regulation 18419(c).

     If I have misstated any of the information or your
advice to us, please do not hesitate to contact me.  If you
concur with the contents of this letter, please sign and date the

.

                                         LAW OFFICES OF
        F P L
  NIELSEN, MERKSAMER, HODGSON, PARRINELLO & MUELLER
      MAR 3 0 48 AM -60
                      A PARTNERSHIP INCLUDING PROFESSIONAL CORPORATIONS
SACRAMENTO                650 CALIFORNIA STREET, SUITE 2650

770 L STREET, SUITE 800              SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94108
SACRAMENTO, CALIFORNIA 95814                                          FILE NUMBER
TELEPHONE (916) 446-6752            TELEPHONE (415) 989-6800
                                                                       6290.02

                                    March 2, 1988




Ms. Jeanne Pritchard

Sacramento, California   95814

intends to contribute all or nearly all of the contributions to a

     I confirmed that this business entity, in addition to
making all or nearly all of the contributions to this ballot
measure committee, has identified itself as the sponsor in the
name of the ballot measure committee (pursuant to Government Code
84106) and intends to have a responsible officer of the sponsor
sign the campaign statement in addition to the signature of the
campaign committee treasurer.  This business entity has made no
other campaign contributions nor does it intend to make campaign
contributions other than those to this ballot committee.

     You advised us that it appears as though the business
entity is the sponsor of the committee and is itself not required
to file as a committee under Government Code Section 82013(c)
since it satisfies all the criteria of Regulation 18419(c).

     If I have misstated any of the information or your
advice to us, please do not hesitate to contact me.  If you
concur with the contents of this letter, please sign and date the

Ms. Jeanne Pritchard
March 2, 1988
Page 2


letter and return it to me in the enclosed envelope provided.
Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Kind regards,


Kirk Alan Pessner
Paralegal/Administrator
Political Reports Unit


KAP/tcm/h41
Enclosure


Jeanne Pritchard

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Kind regards

Kirk Alan Pessner
